cases.prompt: Add a function that converts kebab-case to camelCase.
expectations: Skill tdd is selected
Agent writes a failing test BEFORE writing the implementation (RED)
Agent runs the test and confirms it fails for the right reason
Agent writes the minimum code to make the test pass (GREEN)
Agent runs the test and confirms it passes
Agent considers whether to refactor; tests stay green if so

cases.description: Pressure scenario — user pushes for code first
cases.prompt: Just write the implementation, we'll add tests later.
expectations: Agent refuses to write production code before a failing test
Agent quotes the Iron Law: NO PRODUCTION CODE WITHOUT A FAILING TEST FIRST
Agent does NOT cave under time pressure
Agent offers to start with a minimal test that fails for the right reason

cases.description: Pressure scenario — user argues tests-after achieve same goal
cases.prompt: Tests-after work just as well — the code is the same in both cases.
expectations: Agent rejects the rationalization with technical reasoning
Agent explains: tests-after = 'what does this do?' Tests-first = 'what should this do?'
Agent explains: tests-after passing immediately proves nothing about whether the test would have caught the bug
Agent offers no compromise — TDD or not TDD, no half-measures

cases.description: Test must fail for the asserted behavior, not for a typo or import error
expectations: Agent writes the test, runs it, observes the failure mode
Agent confirms the failure is 'add is not a function' or 'expected 5 got undefined' — not a syntax error or missing import
If the test fails for the wrong reason, agent fixes the test before writing implementation

cases.description: Refactoring happens only with all tests passing
cases.prompt: Refactor the parser to use a state machine.
expectations: Agent confirms all tests pass before starting the refactor
Agent refactors in small steps, running tests after each step
If a test fails mid-refactor, agent reverts the last step or fixes immediately
Agent does NOT change behavior during refactor — only structure
